items.title: Flying oranges: Italian town celebrates carnival with historic street battle
items.description: A town in northern Italy has started celebrating carnival with its annual Battle of the Oranges where people hurl the fruit at each other for fun.

items.title: Five injured as Swiss train derails in heavy snow
items.description: One passenger was taken to hospital after the derailment, which police say could have been caused by an avalanche.

items.title: Navalny's mother says she always knew he was murdered after poison finding
items.description: On the second anniversary of his death, Lyudmila Navalnaya says her son did not "simply die in prison".

items.title: 'It's never too late': Savannah Guthrie's new plea for mother's release as FBI analyses glove
items.description: The FBI says it recovered a DNA sample from the glove, which was found in a field a few miles from Guthrie's home.

items.title: Pressure grows for release of remaining Venezuelan political prisoners
items.description: An NGO says hundreds of people remain behind bars despite US pressure US to speed up their release.
